$comment: Single source of truth for per-agent model routing. Every agent's YAML `model:` frontmatter is GENERATED from / CHECKED against this file by scripts/check-model-routing.js (run in CI). Do not hand-edit an agent's `model:` field — change its role here instead. The CLI stamps this file into each scaffolded project's .claude/ so /build-layer escalation can resolve roles at runtime.

escalation.log_format: PLAN-<id> layer=<layer> escalated to orchestrator after 2 worker attempts failed gate
